name: AI Voice Receptionist V2 - Enhanced (with Error Handling & Retry)

parameters.content:
=📥 WEBHOOK TRIGGER
Receives call data from ElevenLabs AI widget

V2 Features:
✅ Input validation
✅ Error handling
✅ Retry logic
✅ Parallel execution
✅ Structured logging

=🔀 ROUTING LOGIC
If booking intent detected:
→ Send to CRM (with retry)

Always:
→ Send to LightRAG analytics
→ Return success response

=⚡ PARALLEL EXECUTION

CRM path (if booking):
→ Send to CRM with retry
→ Handle errors gracefully

Analytics path (always):
→ Merge execution paths
→ Prepare RAG data
→ Insert to LightRAG
→ Handle errors gracefully

Both paths merge before response
